---
title: "Street Medicine"
date: today
description: |
  [Description]
page-layout: full
format:
  html: 
    grid:
      sidebar-width: 200px
      body-width: 1050px
      margin-width: 250px
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)
```

```{r Data, include=FALSE}

library(dplyr)
library(tidyverse)
library(lubridate)
library(plotly)
library(ggplot2)
library(reactable)
library(htmltools)
library(lubridate)
library(gt)
library(janitor)
library(scales)
library(apyramid)
library(kableExtra)
library(knitr)
library(zoo)
library(DT)
library(leaflet)
library(leaflet.extras)

### Street Medicine Sites
street_med_sites <- read.csv('C:/Users/braunrs/OneDrive - University of Cincinnati/Desktop/EIP Websites/eip_data/data/Street Medicine Sites.csv')
head(street_med_sites)

```


# On the Map

```{r Street Med Map, echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}

leaflet() %>%
  addTiles() %>%
  setView(lng = -84.5120, lat = 39.1431, zoom = 11.5) %>%
  addCircleMarkers(
    data = street_med_sites,
    color = 'red',
    label = ~site) %>%
  addProviderTiles(providers$Esri.WorldTopoMap) %>%
  addDrawToolbar()

```
